title: Abstaining for a decade, WINS is back with interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion or IDR 8 per share, taken out of its net profit in 2024.

title: Jhonlin Agro Raya provides IDR 1.4 trillion worth of asset to secure refinance
body: PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR), a palm refinery company, has guaranteed its assets worth IDR 1.4 trillion to PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Q3 2024 saw PLN’s profit slowed down to IDR 25.13 trillion
body: The net profit of PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) slowed down 3.29% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024, although the revenue grew 12.42% yoy from Q3 2023.

title: BUMA to secure mining service contract worth IDR 107.8 trillion
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA) has amended coal mining service contract involving PT Indonesia Pratama (IPR), a subsidiary of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN). BUMA is known to be the subsidiary of usaha PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID).

title: EMP Energi Jaya to conclude 51% acquisition of Sengkang Block
body: PT EMP Energi Jaya (EEJ), a subsidiary of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), concluded the acquisition of 51% of KKS Sengkang Block, South Sulawesi, last week (25/10).

title: Abstaining for a decade, WINS is back with interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion or IDR 8 per share, taken out of its net profit in 2024.

title: Jhonlin Agro Raya provides IDR 1.4 trillion worth of asset to secure refinance
body: PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR), a palm refinery company, has guaranteed its assets worth IDR 1.4 trillion to PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Q3 2024 saw PLN’s profit slowed down to IDR 25.13 trillion
body: The net profit of PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) slowed down 3.29% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024, although the revenue grew 12.42% yoy from Q3 2023.

title: BUMA to secure mining service contract worth IDR 107.8 trillion
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA) has amended coal mining service contract involving PT Indonesia Pratama (IPR), a subsidiary of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN). BUMA is known to be the subsidiary of usaha PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID).

title: EMP Energi Jaya to conclude 51% acquisition of Sengkang Block
body: PT EMP Energi Jaya (EEJ), a subsidiary of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), concluded the acquisition of 51% of KKS Sengkang Block, South Sulawesi, last week (25/10).

title: ADHI secured new contracts of IDR 14.7 trillion
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) scored new contracts of IDR 14.2 trillion until the third quarter (Q3) of 2024.

title: Revenue slipped, BNBR’s net profit multiplied 4 times
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BBNR), a multi-sector holding company under Bakrie Group, booked net profit of IDR 636.27 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: DCII bagged IDR 449.48 billion of profit in Q3 2024
body: PT DCI Indonesia Tbk (DCII) recoded profit growth of 21.34% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024 to IDR 449.48 billion from IDR 370.42 billion seen in the same period last year.

title: Eyeing wider audience, BEER to launch new product
body: PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk (BEER), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, has launched a new product which is believed to possess a quite great of market potential.

title: Bumi Serpong Damai takes over 91.99% of Suryamas Dutamakmur (SMDM)
body: On Wednesday, October 23, PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM), a real estate development company, welcomed a new investor. After acquiring more than 4.39 billion shares, PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk was listed as the controller with a 91.99% share portion. PT Sinarmas Sekuritas made this massive share purchase possible.

title: FILM to issue up to 10% new shares in rights issue
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM), a company engaged in movie production industry, will issue 10% of shares through the capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Samuel Tumbuh Bersama releases 38 million Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera (NSSS) shares
body: More than 38 million shares of PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS), a company that produces palm oil, were released by PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama on Tuesday, October 22. Previously holding 25.64% of the shares, this investor's ownership stake slightly decreased to 25.48%. This transaction was handled by PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Gojek Tokopedia shares sales hit 1.31 billion shares, net foreign volume -477.89 million shares
body: The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold on Thursday, October 24, with foreign investors selling 1.31 billion shares for a net volume of around -180.22 million shares. As a result, the foreign selling volume (4.23 billion shares) outpaced the foreign buying volume (3.75 billion shares). The discrepancy between these statistics resulted in net foreign volume of -477.89 million shares.

title: Foreign sales volume rises, net foreign volume closes at -98,99 million shares
body: On Wednesday, October 23, foreign sales volume climbed to 4.70 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume totaled 4.70 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -98.99 million shares. The general mining contractor services business PT Darma Henwa Tbk (DEWA) had the most shares sold for around 233.36 million, with a net volume of -145.79 million shares.

title: SIDO to distribute interim dividend of IDR 540 billion
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Herbal Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) is allocating interim dividend of IDR 540 billion from its net profit of H1 2024.

title: Q3 2024 saw HEAL’s profit arrived at IDR 468.16 billion
body: The performance of PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the managing company of Hermina Hospital network, reportedly improved in the first nine months (9M) of 2024 compared to 9M 2023.

title: Sales declined, VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas’s net profit plummeted 45.9%
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR), an electric vehicle trading and manufacturing company under Bakrie Group, only recorded net profit of IDR 10.55 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Acquisition concluded, BSDE officially claims 91.99% of SMDM
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE), a real estate developer and management company, has concluded the acquisition 91.99% of PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM).

title: SIDO saw 33% upturn in profit in Q3 2024
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) recorded net profit of IDR 778.11 billion in Q3 2024, up 33% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 586.57 billion seen in Q3 2023.

title: CRSN’s profit plummeted 31.49% in Q3 2024
body: PT Carsurin Tbk (CRSN), a mining supporting service company, reported downturn in its net profit by 31.49% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 12.92 billion in Q3 2024 from IDR 18.87 billion seen in Q3 2023.

title: Private placement concluded, BELI raised IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI), the managing company of Blibli.com marketplace, has reportedly concluded its capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as private placement.

title: Multi Bintang Indonesia’s net profit grew 28.6% in 9M 2024
body: PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk (MLBI), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 762.57 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Morning session saw JCI weakening again
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slipped down throughout the morning session today (24/10).

title: Sales not improving, Unilever Indonesia saw 28.1% decline in 9M 2024
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR), a Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company, booked net profit of IDR 3.01 trillion in the first nine months (9M) in 2024.

title: Supporting Dhoho Kediri Airport, GGRM put in extra IDR 300 billion
body: PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), one of the biggest cigarette manufacturers in Indonesia, has channelled extra capital of IDR 300 billion to PT Surya Dhoho Investama (SDHI).

title: Q3 2024 saw TAPG’s profit skyrocketed 46.6%
body: The profit of PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) saw a surge of up to 46.6% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Wilmar Cahaya’s net profit soared 78.6% in 9M 2024
body: PT Wilmar Cahaya Indonesia Tbk (CEKA), a vegetable oil and cooking oil manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 218.06 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: BCA’s funds reached IDR 1.12 quadrillion in Q3 2024
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) raked in third-party funds (DPK) of IDR 1.12 quadrillion until Q3 2024, up 3.4% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same period last year.

title: Encouraging Innovative Collaboration in the Financial Services Industry, BNI Ventures Brings 10 Axel Arc Startups to Tech in Asia Conference 2024
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI through its subsidiary, BNI Venture, introduced 10 startups participating in the Axel Arc pitching demo day accelerator program at the Tech in Asia Conference 2024 event held on Wednesday (23/10).

title: Dewi Shri Farmindo (DEWI) shares bought and sold by two individual investors
body: Ferry Saputra, an individual investor, invested 19.40 million shares in PT Dewi Shri Farmindo Tbk (DEWI) on Monday, October 21. This investor raised his stake to 6.3% as a result. However, another DEWI investor, Sujito Ngatiman, actually sold 1.75 million shares of the company that farms broiler chickens. He currently controls 8.41% of the company. PT KB Valbury Sekuritas was appointed to facilitate both transactions.

title: TBIG is granted tenor relaxation for USD 325 million revolving facility
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG) signed an agreement of tenor relaxation for its syndicated loan facility worth USD 325 million. Initially, this facility is due August 2024.

title: Optimising idle assets, AMFG enters warehouse leasing business
body: PT Asahimas Flat Glass Tbk (AMFG) is expanding its business to warehouse leasing through its assets located in Ancol, North Jakarta.

title: Forming new subsidiary, PTRO to seek opportunities in mining infrastructure
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) has recently formed a new subsidiary called PT Petrosea Infrastruktur Nusantara (PIN) in order to support business expansion.

title: Gojek Tokopedia shares buying generates net foreign volume surplus of 1.63 billion shares
body: On Tuesday, October 22, PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had up to 4.75 billion shares purchased, for a net volume of 1.54 billion shares. This transaction contributed to an increase in foreign buying volume, which reached 7.41 billion shares, and a net foreign surplus of 1.63 billion shares. The foreign sales volume then totaled 5.78 billion shares.

title: Foreign buy surpasses 5.32 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 1.02 billion shares
body: On Monday, October 21, foreign investors made higher share purchases and recorded a foreign buying volume of up to 5.32 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales totaled just 4.29 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign surplus of 1.02 billion shares. Nearly half of the overall share purchases were done to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which was bought for 2.06 billion shares for a net volume of 777.62 million shares.
